props.name: adapters
props.description: Policy: where uploads go, how mentions resolve, how toasts show.

props.name: features
props.description: Which optional plugins to enable (absent adapters win over `true`).

props.name: locale
props.description: UI language for toolbar labels / placeholders.

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Placeholder text shown while the editor is empty.

props.name: scrollSync
props.description: Sync scrolling between the split panes. Default `true`; set `false` to disable (or toggle it at runtime via the view-switch API).

props.name: selectionToolbar
props.description: Show a floating format toolbar on text selection. Default `true`.
